metadata.synopsis: The legendary Mario Bava directs this cult-classic tale of extra-terrestrial terror when an alien race targets a crew of unsuspecting astronauts.
metadata.title: Planet Of The Vampires

metadata.synopsis: One of the great horror anthology films, and director Mario Bava's personal favorite of his works, "Black Sabbath" tells three short tales of horror.
metadata.title: Black Sabbath

metadata.synopsis: Norman Taylor has been enjoying unusual success at work lately, but could it be due to the magic his wife practices in secret? Infuriated upon discovering her methods, he destroys her protective spells, putting both their lives in mortal danger.
metadata.title: Burn, Witch, Burn!

metadata.synopsis: Horror, suspense, and the occult mix to make this a hair-raising experience even for veteran horror fans.
metadata.title: The Blood On Satan's Claw
